phases.name: Scaffold + Web Audio + Real-Time Pitch Detection

tasks.desc: Vite + React 18 + TS (strict) + Vitest scaffold; pnpm dev/test/build all green
useAudioCapture: getUserMedia -> AudioContext -> AnalyserNode (fftSize 2048, smoothingTimeConstant 0), user-gesture gated
detectPitch(buffer, sampleRate) in src/dsp/pitch.ts: autocorrelation + parabolic interpolation, RMS + confidence gating, C3-C6 lag clamp
60 fps requestAnimationFrame loop (useCapture) feeding a live <PitchMeter>
progress.json + tests.json written at project root
capture.ts: reduceFramesToPhrase + CaptureSession onset/offset gating -> RawPhrase
quantizePhrase: freq -> chromatic note + value + beat position (grid snap + sequential fallback)
useCapture orchestrator: { pitch, phrase, isCapturing, error, start, stop }
<CaptureButton> idle/recording/done + <PhrasePreview> text view
layout.ts: notePosition (treble y-map) + beamGroups + staffGeometry
accidentals.ts: geometric sharp/flat path specs
render.ts: phraseToSVG (staff, clef, noteheads, stems, beams, ledger lines, accidentals)
<NotationCanvas> renders SVGElementSpec[] with hand-scored ink filter + notation.css
End-to-end: hum -> quantize -> render in App.tsx
Reveal ink-draw animation in <NotationCanvas> (frame fade + per-note dashoffset draw + notehead bloom, staggered ~1s, reduced-motion safe)
usePlayback: Web Audio oscillator playback, single currentTime base, detuned sines + A/R envelope, pure dsp/playback.ts timing
SVG export (serializePhraseSVG standalone doc) + localStorage save under undertone.lastPhrase
Aesthetic: drawn treble clef path, paper+ink, stronger stroke irregularity
key.ts: detectKey via Krumhansl-Schmuckler profile correlation -> { tonic, accidental, mode }
harmony.ts: harmonize(phrase, key) -> diatonic Chord[] via melody-fit + functional bias + closing cadence
chordSymbol(chord, key) -> chord-symbol label (C, Am, G)
Extend playback schedule + usePlayback with accompaniment voices (block triad + bass root), softer timbre, lower gain, shared time base
Chord-symbol layer in render.ts above the staff
Wire App: detectKey + harmonize -> NotationCanvas + usePlayback; export includes symbols
bassClef(geom) drawn F-clef path
Grand-staff geometry: treble + bass + brace, bass-clef y-mapping
Engrave accompaniment on bass staff (bass note + stacked triad) aligned by shared beat-to-x
Reveal animation extends to bass staff; export renders full grand staff
